theme.title: Future and Conditional
theme.description: Learn how to talk about the future and hypothetical situations

lesson.title: Future Plans in Context
lesson.instructions: Translate using the future tense in slightly longer sentences

exercises.prompt: Tomorrow I will finish the report after I speak with my manager.
exercises.answer: Mañana terminaré el informe después de hablar con mi gerente.
exercises.explanation: future with a time expression and follow-up action

exercises.prompt: Next month we will move to a bigger apartment if we find a good price.
exercises.answer: El próximo mes nos mudaremos a un apartamento más grande si encontramos un buen precio.

exercises.prompt: She will probably call you when she arrives at the station.
exercises.answer: Ella probablemente te llamará cuando llegue a la estación.
exercises.explanation: future with probability and time clause

exercises.prompt: I will explain everything to you once I understand the problem better.
exercises.answer: Te explicaré todo una vez que entienda mejor el problema.
exercises.explanation: future with object pronoun and subordinate clause

exercises.prompt: They will visit their grandparents this weekend because they have not seen them for months.
exercises.answer: Ellos visitarán a sus abuelos este fin de semana porque no los han visto en meses.

exercises.prompt: We will not make a decision until everyone shares their opinion.
exercises.answer: No tomaremos una decisión hasta que todos compartan su opinión.

exercises.prompt: This summer I will take an intensive course so that I can improve my Spanish.
exercises.answer: Este verano haré un curso intensivo para poder mejorar mi español.

exercises.prompt: The team will present the project on Friday, although they still need to change a few details.
exercises.answer: El equipo presentará el proyecto el viernes, aunque todavía necesita cambiar algunos detalles.

exercises.prompt: Later I will send you the documents that you asked me for this morning.
exercises.answer: Más tarde te enviaré los documentos que me pediste esta mañana.
exercises.explanation: future with relative clause and pronoun

exercises.prompt: If everything goes well, we will open the store before the end of the year.
exercises.answer: Si todo sale bien, abriremos la tienda antes de fin de año.
